chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S-20 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on M.A No.281/2026. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on M.A No.282/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 02.02.2026 Mr. Malik Bux Mari advocate for the appellant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G. = Learned counsel for the appellant does not press instant Criminal Acquittal Appeal; hence same is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE “Saleem”
